Service, tourism, and hospitality management in an international context.

faqCategories.name: Campus Life
faqCategories.description: Questions about living and studying in Berlin.

faqs.title: How do I contact an ambassador?
faqs.body: Use the inquiry form and select your program and preferred language.

faqs.title: Can I ask in German?
faqs.body: Yes. Choose German as preferred language if an ambassador is available.

faqs.title: Are campus tours available?
faqs.body: Campus tours are listed on the events page.

faqs.title: Which program should I choose?
faqs.body: Start with the program overview and ask an ambassador for personal experience.

faqs.title: What happens after I submit an inquiry?
faqs.body: A coordinator reviews it and assigns a suitable ambassador.

studentInquiries.questionMessage: How international is the business program?
Can I work part time during the Computer Science master?
